nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous replacement for teacher
nodes.grounding_span: It is mostly collaborative. I will always have specific points I wish to highlight, but I might need assistance

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI failure on formatting or comprehension
nodes.grounding_span: I give the AI fairly simply tasks which I know it can complete reasonably well

nodes.label: AI as source of engaging content
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of generic or unengaging content
nodes.grounding_span: When the AI suggests good conversational topics, specific questions, or an interesting word game to play, and the student engages productively

nodes.label: Teacher's unique knowledge of students
nodes.grounding_span: I think I have a better idea of my students' weaknesses as well as which topics they might respond to best

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool that preserves teaching profession
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have much hope that my job as a language tutor will be around for much longer

nodes.label: AI failures as teaching opportunities
nodes.grounding_span: understanding how AI tools fail is also a component to my teaching methodology

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I will always have specific points I wish to highlight

nodes.label: Career sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have much hope that my job as a language tutor will be around for much longer

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for content creation
nodes.grounding_span: When the AI suggests good conversational topics, specific questions, or an interesting word game to play, and the student engages productively, this is always satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: If I need some material specially formatted for presentation, this can get a bit frustrating if the AI fails in this regard

nodes.label: Pessimism about long-term job prospects
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have much hope that my job as a language tutor will be around for much longer

nodes.label: Acceptance and celebration of AI's progress despite personal cost
nodes.grounding_span: But I can celebrate AI's achievement at this stage in any case. It is and will be remarkable!

nodes.label: Learning-oriented reflection — extracting lessons from AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: understanding how AI tools fail is also a component to my teaching methodology. Humans often learn more from failures.

nodes.label: Strategic career planning considering AI impact
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have much hope that my job as a language tutor will be around for much longer. AI will simply do a better job basically for free.
